zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Kingsman是Robert Kingsman的女兒，於1528年11月12日出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾斯坦頓 聖 昆丁。她於大約1553年與Reverend John Woodbridge在英國英格蘭維爾爾斯坦頓 聖 昆丁結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1583年在英國英格蘭維爾爾帕特尼享年55歲。

nameMeanings.name: Kingsman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: occupational name, status name from Middle English king ‘king’ + the genitival inflection -(e)s- + man(n) ‘man’, denoting one who had commended his services to the king and not to some baron. Compare Walter Kingesbonde, 1205 in Pipe Rolls (Northumb), Godwin Kingesreive, 1208 in Feet of Fines (Lincs).

variants.name: Pipe Rolls
meanings: 1  English: variant of   Shoot   or   Shute  .

2 English: occupational name from Middle English schut(te), schit(te) ‘archer’ (Old English scytta, a derivative of scēotan ‘to shoot’). Compare Shooter . Liuricus Shitte, 1165 in Pipe Rolls (Suffolk), and John Shit, 1327 in Subsidy Rolls (Suffolk) probably illustrate the eastern dialect form of this word but examples with Shut(te), a form that would belong to south-western and W Midlands dialects, are impossible to distinguish from names in (1).

variants.name: Feet of Fines
meanings: English: locative name probably from Chelmorton (Derbys), which was Cheylmeredune in 1240 ( Feet of Fines , Derbys).

variants.name: Kingman
meanings: English (southeastern): occupational name from Middle English king ‘king’ + man(n) ‘man’, denoting a servant of the king, a member of the king's household.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Kingsman was born on 12 November 1528, in Stanton Saint Quintin, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Robert Kingsman. She married Reverend John Woodbridge about 1553, in Stanton Saint Quintin, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1583, in Patney, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Kingsmanは1528年11月12日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアスタントン サイント クインティンでRobert Kingsmanの娘として生まれた。約1553年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアスタントン サイント クインティンでReverend John Woodbridgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1583年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアプアトニーで55歳で死去した。

ko.Stanton, Wiltshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 스탠턴 세인트 퀸틴

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Kingsman(은)는 1528년 11월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 스탠턴 세인트 퀸틴에서 Robert Kingsman의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1553년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 스탠턴 세인트 퀸틴에서 Reverend John Woodbridge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1583년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 패트니에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Kingsman родилась 12 ноября 1528 г. в местности стантон сеинт куинтинь, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Robert Kingsman. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Reverend John Woodbridge около 1553 г. в местности стантон сеинт куинтинь, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1583 г. в местности патни, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет.
